scripts.dev: concurrently --names "AI,BACK,FRONT" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,magenta" --kill-others-on-fail "cd ai-service && uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload" "cd backend && nodemon server.js" "cd frontend && vite"
scripts.install:all: npm install && (cd backend && npm install) && (cd frontend && npm install)
